recommendations.title: Meeting Evil
recommendations.overview: Follows disillusioned young family man John as a mysterious stranger, Richie takes him on a murder-fueled ride that transforms the weak-willed John into a desperate hero willing to go to any length to protect his family.

recommendations.title: S. Darko
recommendations.overview: Seven years after the events of the first film, Samantha Darko finds herself stranded in a small desert town after her car breaks down where she is plagued by bizarre visions telling of the universe's end. As a result, she must face her own demons, a

recommendations.title: Gang Related
recommendations.overview: After murdering an undercover DEA agent, two corrupt cops scramble to cover up what they've done.

recommendations.title: Blue Crush 2
recommendations.overview: Haunted by the memory of her deceased mother, Dana leaves Malibu behind and heads to South Africa to fulfill her mother's dream of surfing Jefferys Bay.

recommendations.title: Spotlight
recommendations.overview: The true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered the massive scandal of child molestation and cover-up within the local Catholic Archdiocese, shaking the entire Catholic Church to its core.

recommendations.title: Nine Queens
recommendations.overview: Two con artists try to swindle a stamp collector by selling him a sheet of counterfeit rare stamps, the "nine queens".

recommendations.title: Endangered Species
recommendations.overview: Jack Halsey takes his wife, their adult kids, and a friend for a dream vacation in Kenya. But as they venture off alone into a wilderness park, their safari van is flipped over by an angry rhino, leaving them injured and desperate. Then, as two of th

recommendations.title: Lost Bullet
recommendations.overview: A small time delinquent, turned police mechanic for a go fast task force, is forced to defend his innocence when his mentor is killed by dirty cops.

recommendations.title: Jackie Brown

recommendations.title: Mulholland Falls
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Los Angeles, a special crime squad of the LAPD investigates the murder of a young woman.
